needle_load.note: Claude prefaces with 5s idle; combined idle+load=12s.

suture_placement.note: MAJOR disagreement — Claude extends placement to 55s, GPT-4o closes placement at 16.5s and absorbs the rest into first_throw.

third_throw.note: LARGEST per-phase delta ever in the V-series. GPT-4o stuffs all post-knot security throws and retightening into third_throw; Claude closes third_throw at 128s and re-labels the remainder as cutting.

suture_cut.note: Mirror image of third_throw delta. Sum of third_throw+cut: Claude 93s vs GPT-4o 130.5s (delta 37.5s — still wide).

extra_security_throws.note: GPT-4o explicitly flags extra security throws after the required three; Claude infers excessive time in cut phase but doesn't label it as extra throws.

closure.note: V19 joins V12, V13, V18 as drain-agreement cases.

placement_alignment.note: Claude scored 2.0mm per mark, GPT-4o scored 1.5mm per mark. 1mm delta on penalty explains most of the 4-point FLS gap.

fls_score_reconciliation.reconciliation_note: Strong agreement on total time (Δ2.0s) and qualitative rubric. Small FLS delta (4.0) comes almost entirely from placement penalty (Δ1.0mm). Both teachers confirm: task completed, drain closed, knots secure, no avulsion, extra security work consumed excess time. Midpoint 404.0 is a clean reconciled value. This is a fatigue-regression video regardless of which teacher you trust.

systematic_findings.extreme_phase_boundary_disagreement: V19 sets a new record for phase boundary divergence. Third_throw delta of 91.7s and cut delta of 54.2s. Both are mirror-image allocations of the same real-world 130-second post-knot-completion period. This reinforces the V18 finding: phase-level durations cannot be used as a training signal. Total time converges within 2s despite 90s+ phase-level swings.
systematic_findings.drain_gap_pattern_continues_agreeing: V19 is the 4th consecutive drain-agreement case (V18, V12, V13, V19). Running tally — AGREE: V12, V13, V18, V19. DIVERGE: V11, V14, V16, V17. The pattern is clearly not deterministic on any simple recording attribute.
systematic_findings.fatigue_signature_confirmed: Both teachers independently identify efficiency collapse as the defining feature of V19. Claude's 'late-session fatigue crash' narrative (V18 145s → V19 193s = 48s jump) is corroborated by GPT-4o's independent flagging of extra security throws and prolonged post-knot retightening. The reconciled 404 FLS represents a ~47-point drop from V18, which is the largest single-video regression in the V-series.
